summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected. Non-security open PRs are kept independent for maintainer/backlog review; the closed security-sensitive PR is routed to central security handling only.

actions.reason: Independent open PR with outstanding review changes; leave open for normal maintainer/contributor follow-up.
Independent open PR with proof/review blockers; no close-style action is justified.
Security-sensitive item is out of ProjectClownfish backlog cleanup scope; route only this ref to central OpenClaw security handling.
Independent feature PR with maintainer-review and CI blockers; keep open, do not close or merge from this inventory shard.
Independent bug-fix PR with live linked issue and proof/review ambiguity; keep open for normal review rather than close.
Independent channel compatibility PR with review changes and proof/check blockers; no close-style action is supported.
Independent diagnostic bug-fix PR with linked open issue and failing proof/checks; keep open for maintainer/contributor follow-up.
Independent session-state PR with broad surface and outstanding review changes; keep open.
Independent UI bug-fix PR with linked issue and mixed review/check state; keep open rather than close from this shard.
Independent Feishu feature PR with unresolved mergeability/review context; keep open for maintainer review.
